metadata.description: Private marketplace for the frontend team's Claude Code plugins. Distributes versioned subagents (repo-explorer, frontend-reviewer, test-runner, verifier) and skills (component-conventions, pr-prep) across team repos.

plugins.name: frontend-team
plugins.description: Frontend team agents (repo-explorer, frontend-reviewer, test-runner, verifier) and skills (component-conventions, pr-prep). React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Axios + CSS Modules + Jest/RTL + Playwright conventions inlined.
